tasks.summary: Clarify first implementation generation and validation checks.
Deploy public Cloudflare Worker endpoints backed by a live OpenSearch Cranfield index.
Add a public search interface with indexed-data details and sample searches.
Add a flow diagram to Search Explain and expose the retrieval flow through the explain API.
Expose live evaluation metrics and representative correct, wrong, and missed examples on the public Phase 1 page.
Organize the public UI into a phase overview home page and focused Phase 1 subsection pages.
Add official dataset references to public phase pages and Cranfield metadata.
Integrate stable mission, article, search evolution, architecture, decision, tag, and endpoint traceability for Phase 1.
Group live Cranfield failures by behavior and evaluate query-rescue and field-sum candidate architectures.
Drill into zero-relevant-at-10 failures and evaluate the coverage-rerank candidate.
Evaluate PRF, vector/hybrid, local Ollama embeddings, and LTR candidate architectures with traceable evidence through GEN-020.
Evaluate Hugging Face BGE retrieval embeddings in vector/hybrid and LTR paths, recording offline gains above refined PRF.
Validate BGE vector/hybrid in a separate remote OpenSearch candidate index before promotion.
Validate transferability and runtime cost before any public/default promotion of remote BGE hybrid.
Expose key Cranfield architecture milestones through stable search and explain endpoint aliases.
